Description: Umbraco two-factor authentication plugin: TOTP (Time-based OTP) setup and backup code storage via EF Core. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
